reference_impl: official Boltz-2 (torch + pytorch-lightning, GPU -- vast.ai RTX 3090)
reference_commit: boltz 2.2.1 (pip-installed in /root/bvenv on the vast.ai instance; upstream jwohlwend/boltz)
command: boltz predict examples/ubiquitin_msa.yaml --out_dir <out> --seed <N> --recycling_steps 3 --sampling_steps 200 --diffusion_samples 1 --accelerator gpu --use_msa_server --no_kernels --override --preprocessing-threads 4  && python3 scripts/boltz2_ref_layout.py <out>/boltz_results_ubiquitin_msa <harness_dir>

settings.msa_source: colabfold server (api.colabfold.com) via --use_msa_server; uniref 9655 seqs + bfd/mgnify30/metaeuk30/smag30 12014 seqs (combined ~21669), input sequence PDB 1UBQ, 76 res
settings.dtype: bf16-mixed (pytorch-lightning AMP, same precision recipe as the CPU reference; --no_kernels forces the torch-einsum triangle path = the SAME kernel the committed CPU fixtures use, only the execution device differs)
settings.target: ubiquitin (examples/ubiquitin_msa.yaml, PDB 1UBQ, 76 res, MSA on via colabfold server)
settings.execution_device: NVIDIA RTX 3090 24GB (vast.ai on-demand instance ssh1.vast.ai:27350, label pharma-boltz2-ubq-msa-leg-rtx3090)

msa: ColabFold server MSA (api.colabfold.com). The device folds the SAME MSA (tt-bio compute_msa calls the same colabfold server for the same sequence; header-set identity verified post-hoc, matching the Boltz-2 7ROA MSA leg protocol).
provenance: Generated 2026-07-21 on a rented vast.ai RTX 3090 (on-demand) with the pinned official boltz 2.2.1, --use_msa_server for the colabfold MSA, --no_kernels so the torch-einsum triangle kernel matches the committed CPU reference (only the execution device differs: GPU vs CPU), same step/sample/recycle settings as the Boltz-2 7ROA MSA leg (msa-colabfold_200step_1sample_3recycle_bf16) and the Protenix-v2 ubiquitin MSA leg (200 step / 5 sample / 10 cycle). Per-seed fold wall ~14-18s on the 3090 (weights+CCD cached after seed 0; seed 0 incl. ~4min CCD/weights download + 5s MSA fetch). Per-seed reference ptm 0.9244/0.9229/0.9214/0.9233/0.9251, confidence_score 0.9338/0.9338/0.9301/0.9327/0.9342, a tight self-consistent floor as expected for an MSA-backed leg. This is the GPU-reference MSA leg Moritz asked for (task tt-bio-boltz2-ubiquitin-msa-leg, per Moritz directive 2026-07-21 that the GPU reference is the highest-value comparison).
invalidation_rule: Regenerate this fixture ONLY when the pinned reference_commit/version changes or the settings above change. For any other change (device seeds, device code, release tag) the fixture is reused as-is and only the device side re-runs.
